ddls:
CREATE TABLE "brain_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brain region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the brain region */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Coordinates of the brain region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brain region */,
  "hemisphere" TEXT /* Hemisphere of the brain region */,
  "lobe" TEXT /* Lobe of the brain region */,
  "gyrus" TEXT /* Gyrus of the brain region */,
  "brodmann_area" INTEGER /* Brodmann area of the brain region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connectivity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connectivity metric */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "m_constrained" REAL /* Constrained connectivity value */,
  "m_e_constrained" REAL /* Edge-constrained connectivity value */,
  "m_time_constrained" REAL /* Time-constrained connectivity value */,
  "m_unconstrained" REAL /* Unconstrained connectivity value */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., structural, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connectivity_metrics_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network property */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "network_efficiency" REAL /* Network efficiency value */,
  "centrality" REAL /* Centrality value */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity value */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the node */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_properties_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "connected_region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connected brain region */,
  "connection_strength" REAL /* Strength of the connection */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., structural, functional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_connections_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_connections_connected_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("connected_region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cognitive_tasks" (
  "task_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cognitive task */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "task_name" TEXT /* Name of the cognitive task */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the cognitive task */,
  "task_type" TEXT /* Type of cognitive task (e.g., attention, memory) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cognitive_tasks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* DOI of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data visualization */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of data visualization (e.g., graph, heatmap) */,
  "data" TEXT /* Data used to create the visualization */,
  "visualization_tool" TEXT /* Tool used to create the visualization (e.g., Matplotlib, Plotly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the network */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., default mode, central executive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_networks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network metric */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "network_efficiency" REAL /* Network efficiency value */,
  "centrality" REAL /* Centrality value */,
  "modularity" REAL /* Modularity value */,
  "degree" INTEGER /* Degree of the node */,
  "betweenness" REAL /* Betweenness centrality value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_metrics_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES region_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_region_networks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-region-network relationship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the brain region */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_region_networks_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES region_networks ("network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_region_networks_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_region_networks_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES brain_regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_cognitive_tasks" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-cognitive task relationship */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "task_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cognitive task */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_cognitive_tasks_task_id FOREIGN KEY ("task_id") REFERENCES cognitive_tasks ("task_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_cognitive_tasks_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "region_network_properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each network property */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* ID of the network */,
  "community_structure" REAL /* Community structure value */,
  "hubness" REAL /* Hubness value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_region_network_properties_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES region_networks ("network_id")
)
